title: Nephelaphyllum cordifolium

The classification of Nephelaphyllum cordifolium is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Malpighiales, family Achariaceae, genus Nephelaphyllum, species N. cordifolium.
